vaastuScore.title: Your Vastu Score
vaastuScore.subtitle: Select the direction each room faces. We'll calculate a 0–100 Vastu score and give you a tailored, no-demolition remedy for every imbalance we find.
vaastuScore.formHeading: Which direction does each room face?
vaastuScore.formHint: Stand in the centre of the room and face outward — the direction you face is the room's facing direction.
vaastuScore.saveDesc: Save to your profile so you can track improvements over time.
vaastuScore.signupDesc: Create a free account to save your results, track improvements, and access personalised remedies.
vaastuScore.howItWorksBody: Each room is weighted by its Vastu importance — entrance (22 pts), kitchen (20 pts), master bedroom (18 pts), pooja room (14 pts), toilet (14 pts), living room (12 pts). A direction classified as Ideal earns the full weight; Acceptable earns 65 %; Neutral earns 30 %; and Needs Attention earns 0 pts but comes with a targeted no-demolition remedy.

verdicts.Excellent: Outstanding Vastu alignment. Your home is set up to support well-being, prosperity, and peace.
verdicts.Good: Good overall energy with a few rooms that can be improved with simple, non-structural remedies.
verdicts.Fair: Several rooms are misaligned. Apply the remedies below to meaningfully improve your home's Vastu.
verdicts.Poor: Significant Vastu imbalances detected. The no-demolition remedies below can help neutralise negative energy.

roomGuides.title: Vastu for Every
roomGuides.subtitle: Each room governs a different dimension of life. Discover the ideal directions, what to do and avoid, and practical no-demolition remedies for any placement.
roomGuides.ctaSubtitle: Use our free Vastu Score tool to get a personalised room-by-room analysis and remedies tailored to your home.

faq.title: Vastu FAQ
faq.subtitle: Honest answers to the questions we hear most often — from whether you need to break walls, to how Vastu applies abroad.
faq.aiGuruDesc: The chat widget in the bottom-right corner of every page is powered by our AI Vastu expert. Ask it anything about directions, remedies, or room placement — it draws on classical Vastu knowledge to give you a personalised answer.
questions: Do I have to demolish or break walls to follow Vastu?
